# TrueWeb Solutions

> Nigerian web design, development, and SaaS agency. We build fast, production-ready websites and AI-powered software products.

TrueWeb Solutions is a Nigerian software agency that builds websites and SaaS products for businesses across Nigeria and Africa. We ship in 7 weeks or less.

## Services

- **Web design & development**: Custom websites for businesses, startups, and enterprises
- **SaaS development**: Full-stack SaaS products built and deployed to production
- **AI product development**: AI-powered tools and automations integrated into existing products
- **E-commerce**: Shopify alternatives, custom storefronts, payment integration (Squad, Paystack, Monnify)

## Our SaaS portfolio

We have built and operate 3 AI-powered SaaS products:

- **ReplyAI** (https://replyai.com.ng) — AI email reply generator and meeting notes tool. Supports English, Pidgin, Yoruba, Hausa, French.
- **HarvestAI** (https://harvestai.com.ng) — AI web scraping, lead generation, and B2B data extraction tool.
- **SupportAI** (https://supportai.com.ng) — No-code AI customer support chatbot builder with multilingual support for Nigerian languages.

## Process

7-week delivery process: Discovery → Design → Development → Testing → Launch → Support.

## Pricing

Website projects from ₦250,000. SaaS products from ₦1,500,000. Custom quote available.

## Location

Nigeria (remote-first, serving clients nationwide and internationally).
